findings.description: JSON parsing error handling uses KeyError but request.json() raises JSONDecodeError only
findings.evidence: except (json.JSONDecodeError, KeyError): on line 818 - KeyError is never raised by request.json()
findings.recommendation: Remove KeyError from exception tuple; only JSONDecodeError is needed

findings.description: Inconsistent error handling pattern in handle_preset_apply
findings.evidence: except (json.JSONDecodeError, KeyError): on line 895 - data.get('preset', '') returns default, KeyError impossible
findings.recommendation: Remove KeyError from exception tuple and add explicit validation for preset_name

findings.description: handle_config_get exposes host field which could reveal internal network topology
findings.recommendation: Consider if host exposure is necessary for admin dashboard; if so, document security implications

findings.description: Missing input validation for pagination parameters
findings.evidence: page = int(request.query.get('page', 1)) without try/except - can raise ValueError for non-integer input
findings.recommendation: Add try/except for ValueError and return 400 for invalid page/page_size parameters

findings.description: New field admin_password_hash added to Config dataclass without default factory consideration
findings.evidence: admin_password_hash: Optional[str] = None is a new optional field
findings.recommendation: Field is optional with None default - backward compatible. Ensure existing configs without this field continue to work (verified: load_config uses data.get() with implicit None default)

findings.description: ProxyServer constructor signature changed with new optional web_admin_handler parameter
findings.recommendation: Signature is backward compatible (optional param with None default). Document that web_admin_handler must be set before start() if provided after construction

findings.description: handle_config_save updates in-memory config but does not validate against running state
findings.evidence: Updates config.port and config.log_level directly without checking if server is running
findings.recommendation: Either reject changes while server is running or document that restart is required (UI shows notice but API doesn't enforce)

findings.description: handle_presets returns preset paths which could expose filesystem structure
findings.evidence: Returns 'path': str(path) for each preset in response
findings.recommendation: Consider if absolute paths are needed by client; relative paths or just names may suffice

findings.description: New public method get_logs_page added to LogManager
findings.evidence: def get_logs_page(self, page: int, page_size: int = 100) -> tuple[list[str], int, int]
findings.recommendation: Return type is explicit tuple. Consider using NamedTuple or dataclass for clarity if this becomes a public API contract

findings.description: handle_service_start does not check if service is already running
findings.evidence: Calls proxy_server.start() without checking current state
findings.recommendation: Return appropriate status if service already running (currently relies on proxy_server.start() behavior)

residual_risks.description: Session tokens stored in memory only - service restart invalidates all sessions
residual_risks.mitigation: 24-hour TTL limits impact; acceptable for Docker admin use case

residual_risks.description: No rate limiting on config save endpoint - could enable rapid config file writes
residual_risks.mitigation: Admin auth required; consider adding rate limiting for production
SameSite=Lax provides some CSRF protection; consider adding CSRF token for high-security deployments

testing_gaps.description: Missing tests for invalid JSON body handling in API endpoints
testing_gaps.recommendation: Add test cases for malformed JSON in login, preset_apply, and config_save endpoints

testing_gaps.description: Missing tests for pagination edge cases (invalid page numbers, negative values)
testing_gaps.recommendation: Add tests for handle_logs with invalid page/page_size parameters

testing_gaps.description: Missing integration tests for route registration order
testing_gaps.recommendation: Add test verifying /_admin/* routes take precedence over catch-all proxy routes
